phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bat colony is
phrases.text_local: Onde vive a colónia de morcegos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih VEE-vih AH koo-LAWN-yuh DIH moo-ruh-SEH-goosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bats naturally inhabit the roof and help protect books from insects.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver a colónia de morcegos na Biblioteca Joanina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR AH koo-LAWN-yuh DIH moo-ruh-SEH-goosh NUH beeb-leeoo-TEH-kuh zhoouh-NEE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Por favor, dirija-se à receção para obter informações sobre a colónia de morcegos.
likely_response.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH koo-LAWN-yuh DIH moo-ruh-SEH-goosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Please go to the reception for information about the bat colony.

responses.english: Please go to the reception for information about the bat colony.
responses.phonetic: POOR fuh-VOHR, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH koo-LAWN-yuh DIH moo-ruh-SEH-goosh.
responses.local: Por favor, dirija-se à receção para obter informações sobre a colónia de morcegos.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o armário para mochilas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW uh-ruh-MAHR-yoo PUH-ruh moo-SHEE-luhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Lockers are mandatory for large bags to preserve the historic book collection.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to collect audio guides
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are distributed near the entrance to manage visitor flow efficiently.

likely_response.local: Pode recolher os audioguias na bilheteira da Porta Férrea.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih reh-koo-LYEHR OOSH ow-deeoo-GEEUHSH NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH PAW-ruh-tuh FEH-reeuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can collect the audio guides at the ticket office at Porta Férrea.

responses.english: You can collect the audio guides at the ticket office at Porta Férrea.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih reh-koo-LYEHR OOSH ow-deeoo-GEEUHSH NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH PAW-ruh-tuh FEH-reeuh.
responses.local: Pode recolher os audioguias na bilheteira da Porta Férrea.

phrases.text_local: Estou na Biblioteca Joanina. Onde posso guardar a minha mochila?
phrases.pronunciation: ihsh-TOOW NUH beeb-leeoo-TEH-kuh zhoouh-NEE-nuh. OHNG-dih PAW-soo gwuh-ruh-DAHR AH MEE-nyuh moo-SHEE-luh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou ao guia sobre o armário para mochilas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GEEUH SOHB-rih AW uh-ruh-MAHR-yoo PUH-ruh moo-SHEE-luhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at reception or the guide about the locker for backpacks.

responses.english: Ask at reception or the guide about the locker for backpacks.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GEEUH SOHB-rih AW uh-ruh-MAHR-yoo PUH-ruh moo-SHEE-luhsh.
responses.local: Pergunte na receção ou ao guia sobre o armário para mochilas.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso guardar a minha mochila?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo gwuh-ruh-DAHR AH MEE-nyuh moo-SHEE-luh?

likely_response.translation_en: Go to the locker for backpacks.

responses.english: Go to the locker for backpacks.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Manuscripts Room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Manuscritos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH muh-nooshk-REE-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The room houses rare 18th-century texts and requires guided access.

likely_response.translation_en: You can get directions at the reception.

responses.english: You can get directions at the reception.
